review_title: Will activity try to screw you over
description: Guardrails are too many. AI is not a person; it's a tool. For example, I can go to Home Depot, buy a hammer, and build a house and Home Depot senses I may be competing for all the home builders in the world and will not let me pound nails with it the same way my competition is. In my case, I needed a privacy policy; the lawyer told me to get some terms, bring him something with the terms I like, and as a first draft, he would take it from there- doing it this way saves money. I am a startup, and my potential to fail is huge- it will be because no one buys my product, not because my Privacy policy was off. So, I copy a bunch of clauses from out-of-town companies that cannot compete with me or with them. Put it in text-cortex- NOPE, we will edit this. It could be harmful because it collects too much customer data (it's an online clinic). NOT ON PLAGURISM, BUT THEY MAKE AN ETHICAL DECISION. To prove this, I copied and pasted text-cortex's PP into the prompt and asked the same thing. There was NO problem because it saw its name. Go over to Claude- same thing? NOPE. It does the whole thing- no issues. And it even suggests better company protective clauses. On research- it is super woke- I need a framework for an article I am going to write on declining fertility and sperm rates in the USA. There is nothing controversial here; it is well-known. NOPE. It's harmful and puts forth untrue stereotypes about men and is hateful. Ok, let's test, change to women. Now, I am misogynistic, and it will not perpetuate hate. This is all happening on Claude, by the way, in the text cortex's prompt. Put in the same questions, hop over to Claude on the anthropic site (paid)- no problem either way. Explain with examples. I have 1020 credits left (a lot), so all I want is the prorated amount back. They made me wait for 4 days to get a response, and it was no. This goes above and beyond their 5-day refund policy because it is; actively blocking normal use I want just the prorated amount (amount left in the month of credits)
author: Erik B.
pros: NOTHING. It has a bunch of features- but that's no good if you cannot write an article or for legal anything- forget it the ethical nanny will kick in on a simple legal doc (first draft)
cons: guardrails are excessive times out gets lazy frequently claude model is the only good one- but they make it "woke". no refunds or prorating of subscription of unused tokens. slow customer service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
